ORC453_Optimize_03.00.07.ddt

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference ORC453_Optimize_03.00.07.ddt_20191209T164811.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 500000
Send ID 752
Receive ID 772
Functional Addr 2C
Functional Name Airbag-SRS
